title: 全球頂尖法律事務所ROSEN鼓勵Norfolk Southern Corporation投資人在NSC證券集體訴訟的重要截止日期前尋求法律服務
text: 紐約--(BUSINESS WIRE)--(美國商業資訊)--原因：全球投資人權益法律事務所Rosen Law Firm提醒在2020年10月28日至2023年3月3日期間（含上述兩個日期，簡稱「集體訴訟期」）購買Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC)普通股的投資人，申請成為原告代表的截止日期為2023年5月15日。 這意味著什麼：如果您在集體訴訟期內購買了Norfolk Southern證券，您可能有機會透過勝訴分成安排而獲得賠償，無需支付任何自負費用或開支。 下一步是什麼：如果您想加入Norfolk Southern集體訴訟，請造訪https://rosenlegal.com/submit-form/?case_id=12322，或撥打免費電話866-767-3653致電Phillip Kim律師，或者寄送電子郵件至pkim@rosenlegal.com或cases@rosenlegal.com，以獲取有關該集體訴訟的資訊。這項集體訴訟已經發起，如果您希望成為原告代表，您必須在2023年5月15日之前向法院提出申請。原告代表是指代表其他集體訴訟成員主導訴訟的代表方。 為什麼選擇ROSEN LAW：我們鼓勵投資人選擇擁有成功領導經驗的合格律師。發佈公告的法律事務所通常缺乏相當的經驗、資源或任何有價值的同儕認可。許多此類法律事務所實際上並不從事證券類集體訴訟，而只是把客戶轉介給實際執行訴訟的法律事務所。請明智選擇您的律師。Rosen Law Firm代表全球投資人，專注於證券類集體訴訟和股東派生訴訟。Rosen Law Firm曾就針對一家中國公司的頂級規模證券類集體訴訟達成和解。2017年，Rosen Law Firm在ISS證券類集體訴訟服務評比中因證券類集體訴訟和解數量而排名第一。自2013年以來，該法律事務所每年均穩居該榜單前四名，為投資人追回了數億美元的損失。僅在2019年，該事務所就為投資人取得超過4.38億美元的賠償。2020年，創始合夥人Laurence Rosen被Law360評選為最佳原告律師(Titan of Plaintiffs’ Bar)。該事務所的眾多律師都曾得到Lawdragon和Super Lawyers的表揚。 案件詳情：在集體訴訟期間，被告做出虛假和/或誤導性陳述，和/或未揭露：(1)該公司實施的精確調度鐵路(“PSR”)模式（包括使用配備更少人員的更長、更重的列車）導致公司遭受更多的列車出軌事故，且未來發生出軌事故的風險大幅增加；(2)該公司的PSR模式（包括使用配備更少人員的更長、更重的列車）是日益嚴重的冒險文化的一部分，這種文化以犧牲合理的安全預防措施為代價，其原因是公司近期只關注利潤；(3)該公司的PSR模式（包括使用配備更少人員的更長、更重的列車）使公司更容易遭受列車出軌事故，以及可能造成更嚴重的人員、財務、法律和環境後果的列車出軌事故；(4)該公司的資本支出和更換計畫優先考慮的是利潤，而非公司提供安全、高效、可靠的鐵路運輸服務的能力；(5)該公司的遊說工作損害了公司提供安全、高效、可靠的鐵路運輸服務的能力；(6)作為該公司PSR目標的一部分，公司決心減少營運費用，這損害了員工的安全和公司聲稱的「對無傷害工作場所的承諾」，因為公司的PSR計畫優先考慮透過減少人員、加長列車以及減少安全培訓、科技和設備（如熱軸承路邊偵測器（亦稱「熱箱」）和聲音感測器）等方面的支出來節省費用；(7)由於採用PSR原則，該公司的鐵路服務更易發生事故，可能對公司、公司員工、公司客戶、第三方和環境造成嚴重的經濟和人身傷害；(8)該公司未能實施應對措施和程序，以儘量減少因Norfolk Southern運載危險和有毒貨物的列車出軌而對社區造成的威脅；以及(9)因此，被告在集體訴訟期間關於Norfolk Southern營運安全的陳述（如上文詳述）存在重大虛假和/或誤導性。 如欲加入Norfolk Southern集體訴訟，請造訪https://rosenlegal.com/submit-form/?case_id=12322，或撥打免費電話866-767-3653致電Phillip Kim律師，或者寄送電子郵件至pkim@rosenlegal.com或cases@rosenlegal.com，以瞭解有關集體訴訟的資訊。 訴訟集體尚未認證。在訴訟集體得到認證之前，除非您聘請律師，您不會獲得法律代表。您可以自行選擇聘請律師，也可以作為缺席集體訴訟成員，暫時不採取任何行動。投資人在未來任何可能分到的賠償金額，與其是否為原告代表無關。 請在LinkedIn：https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-rosen-law-firm、Twitter：https://twitter.com/rosen_firm或Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/rosenlawfirm/上關注我們，以瞭解最新情況。 律師廣告。先前案例不保證可獲致類似結果。 免責聲明：本公告之原文版本乃官方授權版本。譯文僅供方便瞭解之用，煩請參照原文，原文版本乃唯一具法律效力之版本。

title: 全球顶尖律所ROSEN鼓励Norfolk Southern Corporation投资者在NSC证券集体诉讼的重要截止日期前寻求法律服务
text: 纽约--(BUSINESS WIRE)--(美国商业资讯)--原因：全球投资者权益律所Rosen Law Firm提醒在2020年10月28日至2023年3月3日期间（含上述两个日期，简称“集体诉讼期”）购买Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC)普通股的投资者，申请成为首席原告的截止日期为2023年5月15日。 这意味着什么：如果您在集体诉讼期内购买了Norfolk Southern证券，您将有可能通过胜诉费用安排获得赔偿，无需支付任何自负费用或开支。 下一步是什么：如果您想加入Norfolk Southern集体诉讼，请访问https://rosenlegal.com/submit-form/?case_id=12322，或拨打免费电话866-767-3653致电Phillip Kim律师，或者发送电子邮件至pkim@rosenlegal.com或cases@rosenlegal.com，以获取有关该集体诉讼的信息。这项集体诉讼已经发起，如果您希望成为首席主要原告，您最迟必须在2023年5月15日之前向法院提出申请。首席原告是指代表其他集体诉讼成员主导诉讼的当事人代表。 为什么选择ROSEN LAW：我们鼓励投资者选择拥有成功领导经验的合格律师。发布公告的律所通常缺乏相当的经验、资源或任何有价值的同行认可。许多此类律所实际上并不提起证券类集体诉讼，而只是把客户转介给实际执行诉讼的律师事务所。请明智选择您的律师。Rosen Law Firm代表全球投资者，专注于证券类集体诉讼和股东衍生诉讼。Rosen Law Firm曾经达成针对一家中国公司的顶级规模证券类集体诉讼和解。2017年，Rosen Law Firm在ISS证券类集体诉讼服务评比中因证券类集体诉讼和解数量排名第一。自2013年以来，律所每年均稳居该榜单前四名，为投资者追回了数亿美元的损失。仅在2019年，该律所就为投资者获得了超过4.38亿美元的赔偿。2020年，创始合伙人Laurence Rosen被Law360评选为最佳原告律师(Titan of Plaintiffs’ Bar)。律所的众多律师都曾得到Lawdragon和Super Lawyers的表彰。 案件详情：在集体诉讼期间，被告做出了虚假和/或误导性的陈述，和/或未披露：(1)该公司实施的精确调度铁路(“PSR”)模式（包括使用配备更少人员的更长、更重的列车）导致公司遭受了更多的列车脱轨事故，且未来发生脱轨事故的风险大幅增加；(2)该公司的PSR模式（包括使用配备更少人员的更长、更重的列车）是日趋明显的冒险文化的一部分，这种文化以牺牲合理的安全预防措施为代价，其原因是公司近期只关注利润；(3)该公司的PSR模式（包括使用配备更少人员的更长、更重的列车）使公司更容易遭受列车脱轨事故，以及可能造成更严重的人员、财务、法律和环境后果的列车脱轨事故；(4)该公司的资本支出和更换计划优先考虑的是利润，而非公司提供安全、高效、可靠的铁路运输服务的能力；(5)该公司的游说工作损害了公司提供安全、高效、可靠的铁路运输服务的能力；(6)作为该公司PSR目标的一部分，公司决心减少运营费用，这损害了员工的安全和公司声称的“对无伤害工作场所的承诺”，因为公司的PSR计划优先考虑通过减少人员、加长列车以及减少安全培训、技术和设备（如热轴承道旁探测器（亦称“热箱”）和声音传感器）等方面的支出来节约费用；(7)由于采用了PSR原则，该公司的铁路服务更易发生事故，可能对公司、公司员工、公司客户、第三方和环境造成严重的经济和人身伤害；(8)该公司未能实施应对措施和程序，以最大限度地减少因Norfolk Southern运载危险和有毒货物的列车脱轨而对社区造成的威胁；以及(9)因此，被告在集体诉讼期间关于Norfolk Southern运营安全的陈述（如上文详述）存在重大虚假和/或误导性。 如需加入Norfolk Southern集体诉讼，请访问https://rosenlegal.com/submit-form/?case_id=12322，或拨打免费电话866-767-3653致电Phillip Kim律师，或者发送电子邮件至pkim@rosenlegal.com或cases@rosenlegal.com，以了解有关集体诉讼的信息。 诉讼集体尚未认证。在诉讼集体得到认证之前，除非您聘请律师，您不会获得法律代表。您可以自行选择聘请律师，也可以作为缺席集体诉讼成员，暂时不采取任何行动。投资者在未来任何可能分到的赔偿金额与其是否作为首席原告无关。 请通过LinkedIn：https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-rosen-law-firm、Twitter：https://twitter.com/rosen_firm或Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/rosenlawfirm/关注我们，以了解最新情况。 律师广告。先前案例不保证可实现类似结果。 免责声明：本公告之原文版本乃官方授权版本。译文仅供方便了解之用，烦请参照原文，原文版本乃唯一具法律效力之版本。

title: ROSEN, A GLOBAL AND LEADING LAW FIRM, Encourages Norfolk Southern Corporation Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – NSC
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, reminds purchasers of common stock of Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) between October 28, 2020 and March 3, 2023, both dates inclusive (the “Class Period”), of the important May 15, 2023 lead plaintiff deadline. SO WHAT: If you purchased Norfolk Southern securities during the Class Period you may be entitled to compensation without payment of any out of pocket fees or costs through a contingency fee arrangement. WHAT TO DO NEXT: To join the Norfolk Southern class action, go to https://rosenlegal.com/submit-form/?case_id=12322 or call Phillip Kim, Esq. toll-free at 866-767-3653 or email pkim@rosenlegal.com or cases@rosenlegal.com for information on the class action. A class action lawsuit has already been filed. If you wish to serve as lead plaintiff, you must move the Court no later than May 15, 2023. A lead plaintiff is a representative party acting on behalf of other class members in directing the litigation. WHY ROSEN LAW: We encourage investors to select qualified counsel with a track record of success in leadership roles. Often, firms issuing notices do not have comparable experience, resources or any meaningful peer recognition. Many of these firms do not actually litigate securities class actions, but are merely middlemen that refer clients or partner with law firms that actually litigate the cases. Be wise in selecting counsel. The Rosen Law Firm represents investors throughout the globe, concentrating its practice in securities class actions and shareholder derivative litigation. Rosen Law Firm has achieved the largest ever securities class action settlement against a Chinese Company. Rosen Law Firm was Ranked No. 1 by ISS Securities Class Action Services for number of securities class action settlements in 2017. The firm has been ranked in the top 4 each year since 2013 and has recovered hundreds of millions of dollars for investors. In 2019 alone the firm secured over $438 million for investors. In 2020, founding partner Laurence Rosen was named by law360 as a Titan of Plaintiffs’ Bar. Many of the firm’s attorneys have been recognized by Lawdragon and Super Lawyers. DETAILS OF THE CASE: During the Class Period, defendants made false and/or misleading statements and/or failed to disclose that: (1) the Company’s Precision Scheduled Railroading (“PSR”), including its use of longer, heavier trains staffed by fewer personnel, had led to the Company suffering increased train derailments and a materially increased risk of future derailments; (2) the Company’s PSR, including its use of longer, heavier trains staffed by fewer personnel, was part of a culture of increased risk-taking at the expense of reasonable safety precautions due to the Company’s near-term focus solely on profits; (3) the Company’s PSR, including its use of longer, heavier trains staffed by fewer personnel, rendered the Company more vulnerable to train derailments and train derailments with potentially more severe human, financial, legal, and environmental consequences; (4) the Company’s capital spending and replacement programs were designed to prioritize profits over the Company’s ability to provide safe, efficient, and reliable rail transportation services; (5) the Company’s lobbying efforts had undermined the Company’s ability to provide safe, efficient, and reliable rail transportation services; (6) the Company’s commitment to reducing operating expenses as part of its PSR goals undermined worker safety and the Company’s purported “commitment to an injury free workplace” because the Company’s PSR plan prioritized reducing expenses through fewer personnel, longer trains, and less spending on safety training, technology, and equipment such as hot bearing wayside detectors (a/k/a “hotboxes”) and acoustic sensors; (7) the Company’s rail services were, as a result of its adoption of PSR principles, more susceptible to accidents that could cause serious economic and bodily harm to the Company, the Company’s workers, the Company’s customers, third parties, and the environment; (8) the Company had failed to put in place responsive practices and procedures to minimize the threat to communities in the event that these communities suffered the derailment of a Norfolk Southern train carrying hazardous and toxic materials; and (9) as a result, defendants’ Class Period statements detailed above regarding the safety of Norfolk Southern’s operations were materially false and/or misleading. To join the Norfolk Southern class action, go to https://rosenlegal.com/submit-form/?case_id=12322 or call Phillip Kim, Esq. toll-free at 866-767-3653 or email pkim@rosenlegal.com or cases@rosenlegal.com for information on the class action. No Class Has Been Certified. Until a class is certified, you are not represented by counsel unless you retain one. You may select counsel of your choice. You may also remain an absent class member and do nothing at this point. An investor’s ability to share in any potential future recovery is not dependent upon serving as lead plaintiff. Follow us for updates on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-rosen-law-firm, on Twitter: https://twitter.com/rosen_firm or on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/rosenlawfirm/. Attorney Advertising. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.

text: RADNOR, Pa. , April 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The law firm of Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP (www.ktmc.com) informs investors that a securities class action lawsuit has been filed against Norfolk Southern Corporation ("Norfolk Southern") (NYSE: NSC).

title: NORFOLK SOUTHERN SHAREHOLDER ALERT BY FORMER LOUISIANA ATTORNEY GENERAL: KAHN SWICK & FOTI, LLC REMINDS INVESTORS WITH LOSSES IN EXCESS OF $100,000 of Lead Plaintiff Deadline in Class Action Lawsuit Against Norfolk Southern Corporation - NSC
text: NEW ORLEANS , April 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC ("KSF") and KSF partner, former Attorney General of Louisiana, Charles C. Foti, Jr., remind investors that they have until May 15, 2023 to file lead plaintiff applications in a securities class action lawsuit against Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC), if they purchased the Company's shares between October 28, 2020 and March 3, 2023, inclusive (the "Class Period").

title: Norfolk Southern, SMART-TD reach labor scheduling deal for conductors
text: Norfolk Southern and the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers – Transportation Division (SMART-TD) have reached a “landmark” scheduling agreement for train conductors, according to a joint news release Friday. While the exact details of the agreement weren't available, the tentative deal, which needs to be ratified by union members, offers “a comprehensive suite of new benefits and workplace enhancements,” according to the release.

title: Norfolk Southern and SMART-TD reach comprehensive tentative agreement on quality-of-life benefits
text: Tentative agreement includes scheduling, paid sick leave ATLANTA and INDEPENDENCE, Ohio , April 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE:NSC) and the International Association of Sheet Metal, Air, Rail and Transportation Workers — Transportation Division (SMART-TD) announced Friday that they have reached a ground-breaking, system-wide tentative agreement. The agreement would offer a comprehensive suite of new benefits and workplace enhancements to improve quality of life for Norfolk Southern's conductors.

title: Norfolk Southern eyes service improvements in back half of 2023
text: Norfolk Southern officials are hoping for service improvements in the second half of 2023 following a first half marred by a number of prominent train derailments, most notably the February derailment in East Palestine, Ohio, of rail cars carrying vinyl chloride. “We are going to learn from this accident to become a safer company,” NS President and CEO Alan Shaw said in prepared remarks during NS' first-quarter 2023 earnings call Wednesday.

title: Compared to Estimates, Norfolk Southern (NSC) Q1 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Norfolk Southern (NSC) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended March 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Norfolk Southern (NSC) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Norfolk Southern (NSC) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.32 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $3.15 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.93 per share a year ago.

title: Norfolk Southern says the toxic train derailment cost it $387 million
text: Norfolk Southern said a February derailment that released massive amounts of toxic chemicals in East Palestine, Ohio, cost the railroad $387 million. That dragged profit lower by about a third.

title: Norfolk Southern stock gains after earnings, excluding charge of nearly $390 million related to train derailment, beats expectations
text: Shares of Norfolk Southern Corp. NSC edged up 0.2% in premarket trading Wednesday, after the railroad operator reported first-quarter adjusted profit and revenue that topped expectations, as strength in the company's merchandise and coal business offset weakness in intermodal. Net income fell to $466 million, or $2.04 a share, from $703 million, or $2.93 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Norfolk Southern reports first quarter 2023 results
text: ATLANTA , April 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) announced Wednesday its first quarter 2023 financial results. For the quarter, income from railway operations was $711 million, and diluted earnings per share were $2.04 – down by 34% and 30%, respectively, compared to the first quarter 2022.

title: Norfolk Southern Earnings Are Coming. Expect an Ohio Derailment Charge.
text: Norfolk Southern is due to report first-quarter numbers on Wednesday morning. Wall Street is looking for earnings per share of $3.15 from sales of $3.1 billion.

title: Will Norfolk Southern Stock Trade Higher Post Q1?
text: Although the company should continue to benefit from better price realization, higher costs will likely weigh on its operating ratio.

text: High fuel costs are likely to have hurt Norfolk Southern's (NSC) Q1 performance.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Sell Before They Face Regulatory Risks
text: There are plenty of risky dividend-paying stocks with company-specific issues that make them clearly dividend stocks to avoid, but there are also some names in this category where the reason to stay away is not so apparent. One such example is with shares in companies facing possible regulatory scrutiny.

title: Norfolk Southern reaches paid sick leave agreement with the Brotherhood of Railway Signalmen
text: Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) announced Monday that it has partnered with leaders of another labor union to provide additional craft employees the ability to take up to seven days of paid sick leave per year. In total, ten of Norfolk Southern's twelve unions now have access to paid sick leave, benefitting approximately 6,900 of its dedicated railroaders.

title: Norfolk Southern Class Action Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Reminds Shareholders of Lead Plaintiff Deadline in Securities Class action Lawsuit Against Norfolk Southern Corporation (NSC)
text: RADNOR, Pa. , April 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The law firm of Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP (www.ktmc.com) informs investors that a securities class action lawsuit has been filed against Norfolk Southern Corporation ("Norfolk Southern") (NYSE: NSC).

title: Warren Buffett says Norfolk Southern handled train derailment 'terribly'
text: Warren Buffett said Norfolk Southern dealt poorly with the aftermath of its East Palestine, Ohio, train derailment in February.

title: Warren Buffett says Norfolk Southern's handling of Ohio derailment was ‘tone deaf'
text: Billionaire investor Warren Buffett on Wednesday slammed Norfolk Southern Corp.'s NSC handling of a February train derailment in East Palestine, Ohio.

title: Buying Norfolk Southern
text: Although Wall Street was disappointed by it, I think Norfolk Southern's latest financial results were fairly good. I'm buying in spite of slowing traffic. The dividend is reasonably sustainable in my view, and the valuation is very compelling.

title: NORFOLK SOUTHERN SHAREHOLDER ALERT by Former Louisiana Attorney General: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Reminds Investors With Losses in Excess of $100,000 of Lead Plaintiff Deadline in Class Action Lawsuit Against Norfolk Southern Corporation - NSC
text: NEW ORLEANS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (“KSF”) and KSF partner, former Attorney General of Louisiana, Charles C. Foti, Jr., remind investors that they have until May 15, 2023 to file lead plaintiff applications in a securities class action lawsuit against Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC), if they purchased the Company’s shares between October 28, 2020 and March 3, 2023, inclusive (the “Class Period”). This action is pending in the United States District Court for the Southern District of Ohio. What You May Do If you purchased shares of Norfolk and would like to discuss your legal rights and how this case might affect you and your right to recover for your economic loss, you may, without obligation or cost to you, contact KSF Managing Partner Lewis Kahn toll-free at 1-877-515-1850 or via email (lewis.kahn@ksfcounsel.com), or visit https://www.ksfcounsel.com/cases/nyse-nsc/ to learn more. If you wish to serve as a lead plaintiff in this class action, you must petition the Court by May 15, 2023. About the Lawsuit Norfolk Southern and certain of its executives are charged with failing to disclose material information during the Class Period, violating federal securities laws. The alleged false and misleading statements and omissions include, but are not limited to, that the Company’s “Precision Scheduled Railroading” (“PSR”) strategy designed to increase revenues and decrease operating costs through fewer personnel, longer trains, and less spending on safety training, technology, and equipment would be likely to result in the Company suffering increased train derailments and a materially increased risk of future derailments, and as a result of the above, the Company’s statements regarding the safety of its operations were materially false and/or misleading. The truth began to emerge on February 3, 2023, when a Norfolk Southern freight train, including 11 tank cars carrying hazardous materials, derailed in East Palestine, Ohio and subsequently ignited requiring the immediate evacuation of those within a one-two mile area. Then, on March 4, 2023, another Norfolk Southern freight train derailed near Springfield, Ohio. On this news, shares of Norfolk Southern fell on March 6 and March 7, 2023, closing at $215.18 per share, down $13.21 from a closing price of $228.39 on March 3, 2023. The case is Bucks County Employees Retirement System v. Norfolk Southern Corporation, et al., No. 23-cv-00982. About Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC KSF, whose partners include former Louisiana Attorney General Charles C. Foti, Jr., is one of the nation’s premier boutique securities litigation law firms. KSF serves a variety of clients – including public institutional investors, hedge funds, money managers and retail investors – in seeking recoveries for investment losses emanating from corporate fraud or malfeasance by publicly traded companies. KSF has offices in New York, California, Louisiana and New Jersey. To learn more about KSF, you may visit http://ksfcounsel.com/.

title: ROSEN, RECOGNIZED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Norfolk Southern Corporation Investors with Losses to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action - NSC
text: NEW YORK , April 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  WHY: Rosen Law Firm, a global investor rights law firm, reminds purchasers of common stock of Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) between October 28, 2020 and March 3, 2023, both dates inclusive (the "Class Period"), of the important May 15, 2023 lead plaintiff deadline. title: Norfolk Southern Derailment Spurs Questioning of Turnaround King's Strategy
